temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A close-up shot shows a middle-aged man in a white shirt and tie, his face illuminated by a greenish light. He has a somber and intense expression as he listens to someone off-screen. The background is completely dark, focusing all attention on his face. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and serious mood, introducing a key character who appears to be in a state of deep thought or concern.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, low. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:02-00:05) A high-angle shot reveals a dimly lit interrogation room. Three men are seated around a large table. On the table, a briefcase is open, revealing stacks of money. Another briefcase lies closed beside it. The man from the previous shot is on the right, while another man in a green shirt sits at the head of the table, facing away from the camera. (Storyline: The scene is set as an interrogation. The presence of money in an open briefcase suggests a high-stakes situation, possibly involving a ransom or a bribe.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Reflective, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
